Printable-Prospectus-2025-2026.name: Nursing
Printable-Prospectus-2025-2026.entry_requirements:
for entry into the Bachelor of Nursing Science ODL Programme, applicants must have a:   
 Diploma in Nursing or equivalent.  
 Minimum of two (2) years registration with Lesotho Nursing Council.  
 Letter of permission to study from employer for tho se currently working.  
 Midwifery qualification is compulsory for those who  want to major in Community Health and 
Primary Health Care Nursing. 
 
Career Opportunities : Can establish and run own clinics (Private Practi ce), Manage Health Centr
